scripts.dev: node -e "const http = require('http'); const fs = require('fs'); http.createServer((q, s) => { let f = q.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : q.url.split('?')[0]; f = f.endsWith('/') ? f + 'index.html' : f; try { s.end(fs.readFileSync('.' + f)); } catch(e) { s.statusCode = 404; s.end('Not found'); } }).listen(3000); console.log('Server running on http://localhost:3000'); "
